Arrow Keys Not Functional in Widget Test Page

These ARIA widgets (role="listbox" and role="menu") have no JavaScript to handle arrow key navigation. The agent focuses each widget and presses ArrowDown — expecting the state to change.

Fruit Listbox (no arrow key handler)

Apple
Banana
Cherry
Date
Elderberry

Actions Menu (no arrow key handler)

Archive
